message:
Enhance Node.js polyfills for better compatibility

- Implement crypto.subtle (SubtleCrypto) with Web Crypto API:
  - digest() using native __edgebox_hash
  - sign/verify with HMAC
  - generateKey, importKey, exportKey
  - deriveBits/deriveKey with PBKDF2
  - CryptoKey class for key management

- Enhance zlib module:
  - Full API surface with sync and async methods
  - Stream creators (createGzip, createGunzip, etc.)
  - All zlib constants
  - Hooks for native compression if available

- Improve async_hooks module:
  - executionAsyncResource() support
  - AsyncResource.bind() method
  - Proper hook lifecycle (init, before, after, destroy)
  - Resource tracking with Map

- Add missing modules:
  - dns: Full API with promises and constants
  - inspector: Session class with proper stubs
  - v8: Serializer/Deserializer, heap stats stubs

- Update polyfill hash to use main polyfill files
